We automate your business workflows so you can focus on growth.

Operational Flow

How we help your business

01

Audit

We look at how you are running right now to spot manual friction and leaks.

02

Map

We document and map your daily operations and data flow paths.

03

Design

We discuss and align on a brand new, automated system blueprint.

04

Deploy

We build and implement the new workflow directly onto your business.

What We Do

Core Concept

01

Attract

Goal: Get attention

How people discover your business.

  • Instagram
  • Facebook Ads
  • Google Search
  • YouTube
  • Referrals
  • SEO
  • Word of mouth
Deploy Engine
01Attract
02

Convert

Goal: Get them to take action

Turn visitors into leads or customers.

  • Website
  • Landing page
  • Online store
  • Contact form
  • WhatsApp chat
  • Booking system
Deploy Engine
02Convert
03

Deliver

Goal: Create a great customer experience

Provide the product or service.

  • Restaurant serves food
  • E-commerce ships products
  • Agency delivers work
  • Salon provides service
Deploy Engine
03Deliver
04

Retain

Goal: Turn customers into repeat customers

Bring customers back.

  • WhatsApp updates
  • Email marketing
  • Loyalty programs
  • Discounts
  • Follow-up messages
  • Memberships
Deploy Engine
04Retain
The flow that every crore company has used

Click to contact
[ HOW WE HELP YOUR BUSINESS ]

How we're going to help your business.

We follow a structured 4-step process to transition your operations from chaotic manual work to smooth, self-running digital systems.

01 /AUDIT

We'll see how you are running rn

  • Analyze existing tools and manual steps
  • Locate hidden bottleneck areas
  • Identify revenue & time leaks
  • Audit team workload distribution
02 /ANALYZE

Then understand your operations

  • Map daily task dependencies
  • Trace pipeline and customer friction
  • Assess tools (POS, CRM, databases)
  • List repeat tasks fit for automation
03 /DISCUSS

Our team and your team will discuss the new workflow

  • Collaborate on custom systems design
  • Review optimized process blueprints
  • Align logic with your business goals
  • Establish timelines and success KPIs
04 /IMPLEMENT

Implementing the New Workflow onto Your Business

  • Deploy custom tools & API syncs
  • Seamlessly connect all systems
  • Onboard and train your operators
  • Monitor live metrics for smooth scaling
Core Philosophy

Automation isn't about replacing people; it's about freeing time for more productive tasks.

automation-philosophy.mp4
flowify.agency

Flowify engineers high-efficiency operational software, Tally ERP integrations, WhatsApp automations, and brand-amplification platforms for Indian businesses. We replace manual bottlenecks with persistent, self-healing code.

Engine Classes

  • 1. Attract
  • 2. Convert
  • 3. Deliver
  • 4. Retain

Integration Relays

  • Tally ERP API Connect
  • WhatsApp Business Cloud API
  • Zoho Flow & Zoho CRM Relay
  • Razorpay POS Webhooks
  • IndiaMART & Justdial Ingest

Systems Chassis
